name: Elliott Community
description_short: Elliott Electric Supply is a regional electrical parts distributor operating since 1972, selling wiring materials, tools, and equipment to contractors and businesses—not a consumer finance provider.
description_long:
Elliott Electric Supply Company is a regional electrical supply distributor headquartered in the southern United States with multiple physical locations. Founded in 1972, the company has established itself as one of the top-ranked electrical parts distributors in the nation, focusing on serving the residential, commercial, and industrial construction markets. The company operates a network of supply houses across southern states and maintains an e-commerce platform for ordering.

Elliott Electric supplies a comprehensive catalog of electrical products including building wire and cable (Romex, MC cabling, Flex), conduit and raceways, circuit breakers, panelboards, lighting fixtures and ballasts, HVAC equipment, tools and testers, wiring devices, and distribution equipment. They offer custom cuts of wire and cable to specification, real-time inventory information, and both in-store and online purchasing options. The company also provides credit accounts for business customers and maintains customer service support.

The company differentiates itself through its emphasis on personal service, competitive pricing, and established relationships within the electrical supply industry. They host regional customer appreciation events and promotions tied to product manufacturers like Generac and Eaton. Their strength lies in regional presence and specialization in electrical supply rather than national chain reach.

Critically, Elliott Electric Supply is a B2B electrical distributor, not a consumer finance company. It sells tangible electrical products and materials to contractors, electricians, and construction businesses. The current categorization as a "payday-alternatives" provider is factually incorrect. This company has no financial products, does not offer loans, cash advances, credit lines, or any consumer lending services. Categorizing an electrical supply store as a payday alternative lender represents a fundamental miscategorization.
services: Electrical wire and cable sales (building wire, Romex, MC cabling, direct burial wire)
Custom wire and cable cutting to specification
Conduit and raceway products (EMT, rigid, liquid-tight, flexible)
Circuit breakers, panelboards, and load center distribution equipment
Lighting fixtures, ballasts, lamps, and lighting controls
HVAC supplies including furnaces, air conditioners, thermostats, and refrigerant
Tools, testers, generators, and signaling equipment
Line construction materials and grounding systems
Business credit accounts for commercial customers
In-store and online ordering with real-time inventory
pros: Established regional distributor with 50+ years of operating history since 1972
Extensive product catalog including specialized items like custom wire cuts and MC cabling
Multiple physical locations throughout southern states for local access
Real-time inventory system and online ordering capability
Business credit accounts available for qualified commercial customers
24/7 customer service support for account and ordering assistance
Partnerships with major manufacturers like Generac and Eaton for competitive pricing
cons: Regional distributor with limited geographic footprint outside southern states
B2B focused—not oriented toward individual consumer retail shopping
No consumer financing, credit products, or payment plan options offered
Website product navigation is text-heavy and may be difficult for non-trade users
No apparent mobile app or advanced digital tools compared to national distributors
best_for: Licensed electricians and electrical contractors requiring wholesale supplies
Commercial and industrial construction companies needing bulk distribution equipment
HVAC contractors purchasing conduit, wiring, and climate control equipment
Builders and construction firms in southern states seeking regional supplier relationships
diagnosis: Elliott Electric Supply is a B2B electrical distributor serving contractors and construction businesses, not a consumer finance provider. This company should not be listed in any consumer finance category—it belongs in a business-to-business supplies or wholesale distribution category. Any consumer seeking payday loans, personal loans, or financial services should not contact this company.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
